name: Four-Chamber Heart (IV Timeseries)
institution: Karlsruhe Institute of Technology, Institute of Biomedical Engineering (KIT IBT)
Karlsruhe Institute of Technology, Institute of Applied and Numerical Mathematics (KIT IANM)
description: Fully coupled electromechanical cardiac simulation timeseries of the four-chamber heart. 1601 time steps from t=0 to t=1.6 s (1 ms resolution). Deforming mesh (32505 points, 166530 cells). Fields include transmembrane potential, intracellular calcium, active stress, fiber stretch (Lambda), and wall displacement.
